name: Capyloop Stones
author: Poki
description: Capyloop Stones is a watermelon merge game where your ultimate goal is to unlock the cutest capybara! Start by merging two identical stones to create larger ones, gradually working your way up to the holy capybara. Along the way, you'll discover and unlock a variety of cool and unique animals like crocodiles, urchins, mammoths, and more. Begin with the smallest stone and merge your way to victory. Can you reach the capybara and unlock all the achievements? How to play Capyloop Stones? Move the stone with the mouse and click to drop it! Who created Capyloop Stones? Capyloop Stones is created by Capyloop. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Capyloop Stones for free? You can play Capyloop Stones for free on Poki. Can I play Capyloop Stones on mobile devices and desktop? Capyloop Stones can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
